TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Bob_Armstrong, title = Bob_Armstrong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Armstrong} }

S.FORM: Bob Armstrong nalecuhan i Detroit, Michigan, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Armstrong i 1955 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 12 ku uwac atu silsil 87, namapili' tu nu Rochester Royals putiput. 6 bulad 17 demiad, 1933 a mihca, Bob Armstrong, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob armstroŋ nar~ɾəʦuħan i dətroit, miʦħigan, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob armstroŋ i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka ** ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu *oʦħəstər *ojar~ɾs putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob armstroŋ, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Bob Armstrong nalecuhan i Detroit, Michigan, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Armstrong i 1955 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 12 ku uwac atu silsil 87, namapili' tu nu Rochester Royals putiput. 6 bulad 17 demiad, 1933 a mihca, Bob Armstrong, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob armstroŋ nar~ɾəʦuħan i dətroit, miʦħigan, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob armstroŋ i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka ** ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu *oʦħəstər *ojar~ɾs putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob armstroŋ, miunduaj.
